title: liatris squarrosa var. glabrata
intro: Liatris squarrosa var. glabrata, also known as the prairie blazing star, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Liatris squarrosa var. glabrata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the roots and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
